name: conf-inject-script
description: 基于Cloudflare Worker的conf配置文件注入脚本

scripts.deploy: npm run generate:wrangler && npx wrangler deploy --config wrangler.toml
scripts.dev: npm run generate:wrangler && npx wrangler dev --config wrangler.toml
scripts.kv:create: npx wrangler kv namespace create CONFIG_KV
scripts.logs: npm run generate:wrangler && npx wrangler tail --config wrangler.toml
